pkgmetadata.longdescription: unify.. image httpstravis-ci.orgmyintunify.svgbranchmaster target httpstravis-ci.orgmyintunify alt Build statusModifies strings to all use the same quote where possible.ExampleAfter running unify --in-place example.pythis code.. code-block python x abc y hellogets formatted into this.. code-block python x abc y hello
